prompt.goal: Tạo entity MatchingResult lưu điểm gợi ý job↔tutor, DbSet + Fluent API, migration. Không UI, không gọi Python.
prompt.currentState: - JobPosting + TutorProfile đã có trên stack M3/M2 - MatchingResult CHƯA có
prompt.scope: - Fields: JobPostingId (nullable), StudentId, TutorProfileId, SimilarityScore (0–1), Rank, ModelVersion, CreatedAt - FK JobPosting SetNull; Student Cascade; TutorProfile Cascade - Index JobPostingId - Score HasPrecision(5,4)
prompt.hardRules: - KHÔNG Controller/View/Service scoring - KHÔNG gọi HTTP Python - KHÔNG sửa JobPosting fields
prompt.tasks: 1. Đọc schema MatchingResults 2. Tạo model + Fluent 3. ef migrations add AddMatchingResults 4. dotnet build
prompt.constraints: .NET 10 / EF Core SQL Server; XML doc public types
prompt.acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] Entity đủ field theo schema - [ ] Migration tạo MatchingResults - [ ] build pass
prompt.testPlan: 1. dotnet build 2. Kiểm tra migration CreateTable MatchingResults
